CRISPR Therapeutics operates globally, with offices in Switzerland, the United States, and the United Kingdom, and maintains a manufacturing facility in the United States. The company also engages in strategic partnerships to advance its research and development activities. | Business model: Business-to-Business, Manufacturing. | Target markets: Biotechnology, Healthcare, Pharmaceuticals. | Core offerings: CRISPR/Cas9 Therapeutic Development, Allogeneic CAR T Cell Therapy Development, Patient Advocacy and Community Engagement Services, Gene-Based Medicine Development, Gene Editing Technology Development, Strategic Biotechnology Partnership Collaboration, Investigational Gene Therapy Commercialization, Hemoglobinopathy Gene Therapy Development, Regulatory-Approved Gene Therapy Commercialization, Regenerative Medicine Therapy Development, Immun-Oncology Gene Therapy Development, Autoimmune Disease Gene Therapy Development, In Vivo Gene Editing Therapy Development, Sustainability and Corporate Social Responsibility Services.

Description: AliveDx Suisse SA is a Swiss biotechnology company engaged in in-vitro diagnostics. The company develops and supplies diagnostic products and platforms for clinical laboratories, including blood bank reagents and automated testing solutions. AliveDx serves healthcare providers in hospitals, laboratories, and clinics, and operates internationally with offices in the UK, US, UAE, and other regions. The company is certified for employee well-being and incorporates sustainability practices in its operations. | Business model: Business-to-Business, Manufacturing. | Target markets: Healthcare. | Core offerings: Diagnostic Product Customization Services, Laboratory Process Automation Solutions, Automated Microarray System Manufacturing, Clinical Workflow Optimization Solutions, Clinical Decision Support Solutions Development, Diagnostic Product Exporting, In-Vitro Diagnostics Solutions Development, Blood Bank Reagents Manufacturing, Patient Care Improvement Solutions, Multiplexing and Multimodality Testing Platform Development, Sustainable Diagnostics Product Development, Laboratory Workflow Efficiency Solutions, Laboratory Partnership Services, Clinical Diagnostics Consulting Services, Laboratory Diagnostic Product Distribution.

Description: Helsinn Healthcare SA is a Swiss pharmaceutical company engaged in the research, development, manufacturing, and commercialization of pharmaceuticals, medical devices, and nutritional supplements. The company operates in oncology, rare diseases, and supportive care, and manages a global portfolio of products approved in multiple countries. Helsinn also provides licensing services, including in-licensing, partnering, and business development, and maintains a pharmacovigilance system for adverse event monitoring. The company is certified for sustainability and ethical standards, and its operations are supported by a hybrid manufacturing approach and a global presence with offices in Ireland, the United States, and China. | Business model: Business-to-Business, Manufacturing, Licensing. | Target markets: Biotechnology, Healthcare, Pharmaceuticals. | Core offerings: Pharmaceutical Commercialization and Distribution, Pharmaceutical Research and Development, Pharmacovigilance Services, Pharmaceutical Manufacturing, Oncology Drug Development, Direct Pharmaceutical Sales, Supportive Care Product Development, Pharmaceutical Business Development Services, Pharmaceutical Licensing and Partnerships, Nutritional Supplement Manufacturing, Medical Device Manufacturing, Rare Disease Drug Development.

Description: TRB CHEMEDICA INTERNATIONAL SA, DBA TRB Chemedica, is a Swiss pharmaceutical company engaged in the development, manufacturing, and distribution of hyaluronic acid-based medical devices, medical food supplements, and pharmaceutical products. The company operates a Swiss manufacturing facility and maintains subsidiaries and distributors in multiple countries across Asia, South America, Europe, and the United Kingdom. TRB Chemedica is ISO certified and is active in the pharmaceutical, biotechnology, and medical device sectors, with a focus on ophthalmology, rheumatology, and neurology. | Business model: Business-to-Business, Manufacturing, Wholesale. | Target markets: Biotechnology, Healthcare, Pharmaceuticals. | Core offerings: Rheumatology Product Development and Manufacturing, Pharmaceutical Product Promotion Services, Pharmaceutical Licensing Services, Global Medical Device Distribution, Custom Pharmaceutical Solution Development, Ophthalmology Product Development and Manufacturing, Pharmaceutical Product Research and Development, Active Pharmaceutical Ingredient Manufacturing, Neurology Product Development and Manufacturing, Global Pharmaceutical Product Distribution, Medical Device Manufacturing, Biofermentative Medical Device Development, Medical Food Supplement Manufacturing, Scientific Collaboration Services.

Description: Celonic AG is a Swiss biotechnology company engaged in the development and manufacturing of biologics, including monoclonal antibodies, bispecifics, and other complex molecules. The company provides services from cell line development to commercial manufacturing, and also offers fill and finish services through a third-party strategic alliance partner. Celonic operates globally, with offices in Switzerland and Germany, and is committed to sustainability and stewardship in its operations. | Business model: Service Provider, Business-to-Business, Enterprise, Manufacturing. | Target markets: Biotechnology, Pharmaceuticals. | Core offerings: Micro-Bioreactor Platform Utilization Services, GMP-Compliant Biologics Manufacturing, Commercial Biologics Manufacturing, Biologics Contract Development and Manufacturing, Biosimilar Drug Development and Manufacturing, Perfusion Bioprocessing Technology Implementation, Process Intensification Technology Implementation, Complex Molecule Development and Manufacturing, Bispecific Molecule Development and Manufacturing, Fill and Finish Manufacturing Services, Next-Generation Bioprocessing Solutions, Cell Line Development Services, Monoclonal Antibody Development and Manufacturing.

Description: ADC Therapeutics SA is a Swiss biotechnology company engaged in the research, development, manufacturing, and commercialization of antibody drug conjugates (ADCs) for the treatment of hematological malignancies and solid tumors. The company operates globally, with offices in Switzerland, the UK, and the USA, and is involved in clinical development, manufacturing, and commercialization of ADC-based therapies. ADC Therapeutics also conducts research and development activities, including the advancement of next-generation ADCs and the development of combination therapies. | Business model: Business-to-Business, Manufacturing. | Target markets: Biotechnology, Healthcare, Pharmaceuticals. | Core offerings: Antibody Drug Conjugate Commercialization, Oncology Drug Pipeline Advancement, Next-Generation ADC Research, Antibody Drug Conjugate Clinical Development, Antibody Drug Conjugate Manufacturing, Combination Therapy Development, Solid Tumor Treatment Development, Hematological Malignancy Treatment Development, Strategic Oncology Partnership Development, Antibody Drug Conjugate Research and Development.

Description: Tillotts Pharma AG is a Swiss pharmaceutical company engaged in the development, in/out-licensing, and marketing of pharmaceutical products for gastroenterology, with a focus on inflammatory bowel diseases. The company also operates as a contract manufacturer and conducts research and development in controlled release technologies. Tillotts Pharma serves global markets through affiliates and strategic partnerships, and is part of the Japanese Zeria Group. | Business model: Business-to-Business, Manufacturing, Licensing. | Target markets: Healthcare, Pharmaceuticals. | Core offerings: Gastroenterology Education Services, GI Therapeutic Research and Development, Pharmaceutical Product Marketing and Distribution, Strategic Partnership Development, Pharmaceutical Research Collaboration, Affiliate Network Product Distribution, Specialty Pharmaceutical Development, Pharmaceutical Pharmacovigilance Services, Patient Care Improvement Services, Gastroenterology Drug In-Licensing, Medical Knowledge Advancement Services.

Description: KD Pharma Group SA is a Swiss contract development and manufacturing organization engaged in pharmaceutical and nutraceutical solutions. KD Pharma Group also operates as a manufacturer of APIs for Omega-3 pharmaceuticals and nutraceuticals, and offers formulation and encapsulation services. Description: A. Menarini GmbH is a Swiss pharmaceutical company engaged in the development, manufacturing, and distribution of medicinal products for primary and specialty care, with a focus on cardiovascular diseases, pain management, infectiology, allergology, and urology. The company also operates in medical aesthetics and provides laboratory services. A. Menarini serves both general practitioners and specialists, and is part of a global network with a presence in 140 countries. | Business model: Business-to-Business, Manufacturing, Wholesale. | Target markets: Consumer Health, Healthcare, Pharmaceuticals. | Core offerings: Pharmaceutical Quality Assurance Services, Specialty Care Pharmaceutical Distribution, Diabetology Pharmaceutical Distribution, Medical Aesthetic Product Distribution, Allergology Pharmaceutical Distribution, Pharmaceutical Research and Development, Urology Pharmaceutical Distribution, Pharmaceutical Product Sales, Gout and Arthritis Pharmaceutical Distribution, Primary Care Pharmaceutical Distribution, Pain Management Pharmaceutical Distribution, Infectiology Pharmaceutical Distribution, Pharmaceutical Product Manufacturing, Pharmaceutical Product Distribution, Cardiovascular Disease Pharmaceutical Distribution.
